name: contact-webrtc-lab
description: A WebRTC teaching lab built with Express 5, PostgreSQL 18, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, and Vite.

scripts.lint: oxlint --deny-warnings server client tests scripts vite.config.mjs vitest.config.mjs
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --fix --deny-warnings server client tests scripts vite.config.mjs vitest.config.mjs
